title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates:
Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India Asia Pacific Associates!
